procedure: Identify Source Format
Identify Keys from Metadata or Documentation
Identify Keys from Metadata Metrics
Classify Format-V-I into Format-V-II using these rules
Classify Source Tables into Tiers for Databases
Organize Auxiliaries into Subordinates and map them to their LOM Objects
Map Orphans to best suitable Object
Organize actual and phantom Accessories into Supplements
Establish LOM Relationships
Establish Roles in Relationships
Establish Logical Variable Model (LVM) for each Object from Source Columns
Identify Group Type for each Variable
Assign Tight Group Keys
Establish list names for Logical List Model (LIM)
Establish LIM list values for Variables with  Format-V-II = Static
Create temporary Lists for Variables with Format-V-II = Specific
Establish LIM list values for Reference lists
Establish LIM list values for Flag lists
Map Source List values to LIM List values
Task
